address.Address: H8FP+V74, Sector 30, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201303, India

school_address.streetAddress: H8FP+V74, Sector 30, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201303, India

reviews.author: Jyoti Verma
reviews.review_body: Best school in noida. Teachers are polite and everyone is helpful. I would recommend to anyone with a high budget. Academics also great

reviews.author: Jade Darling
reviews.review_body: disgusting administration, money minded terrible principal

reviews.author: Rahul Sharma
reviews.review_body: Worst school for child. Don't go by its name as it has nothing in common with the DPS of Delhi. Teachers are only worried about fess being paid and no one now focuses on studies and child welfare. It all from top coming to bottom. Reception and staff are rude and not cooperative at all. Govt schools are much better in many ways. Teachers encourage students to take tuition and coaching rather than focusing on improving ways to teach in a better way.

reviews.author: AANYA ARORA
reviews.review_body:
A very good school.... Studying there and also gone for many interschools in various schools I consider it as THE BEST SCHOOL IN DELHI NCR....
Best branch of DPS NOIDA

reviews.author: Papiya Mahanti
reviews.review_body: The front desk lady is so rude...not at all cooperative and absolutely not bothered. Seems confident ...no complaints against her can harm her. God knows what they are teaching children. Teachers are no better... except for very few exceptions. Not a good place development of children for sure.

reviews.author: Gautam Sibal
reviews.review_body: Children speak horrible language, teachers are in a different world and principal is on a different plane. This school has become a hotbed of corruption, thanks to principal and her personal staff, who demand money from admission to contracts.

reviews.author: Manish Awasthi
reviews.review_body: How many ratings should I give to the school in today's scenario? Anyone can share their experience/feedback. I want to rate the school in terms of (a) Academics (b) ECA (c) Safety, specially of girls and (d) Environment.

reviews.author: Dvij Tripathi
reviews.review_body:
Good school
I have been student of this school for 6 years......
Best experience.
Teachers are very experienced

reviews.author: Vineet Varshney
reviews.review_body: Excellent school in the heart of Noida, known for overall performance whether it is Academics, sports, cultural activities. DPS Noida is a well known name in Noida. Nurturing students for 35 years.

reviews.author: Ankita Sharma
reviews.review_body:
I had contacted dps noida sector 30 for inquiry about admission and my call diverted to front desk. She was so rude and not at all supportive to provide information. I want to complain further as when i said this is ride she fearless said yes i am go ahead and complain.

What manners you put in children if your staff is itself mannerless. Never recommended.
